JUDGE:SUE KAPLAN CLERK:WILLIAMS REPORTER:GALLAGHER 9:35AM: CASE CALLED FOR TRIAL IN DEPT. 7 (611). DEFENDANTS INPRO PER. STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARANZA, JUAN CARLOS AKA JUAN CARLOS GONZALEZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 426 LYON STREET #5 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94117, STAYED UNTIL JUN-16-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 6/16/98 AFTER 11:59 P.M. NO FURTHER STAYS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS BY PARTIES. CIVIL CODE 1542 WAIVED. PLTF. TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
